__fixture__.name: drain_reconnect_later
__fixture__.scenario: Planned relay drain before maintenance. Existing collaboration sessions can finish, new joins are blocked, and reconnect-later is required after the drain completes.

title: Collaboration relay drain in progress
summary: Existing collaboration sessions may finish, but new joins and remote control session starts are blocked until reconnect after maintenance.

affected_scope.scope_summary: Collaboration relay joins and remote-control session starts on the affected managed relay route.

control_plane.note: The relay is draining active sessions and refusing new joins.

data_plane.note: Existing sessions can finish; new joins must reconnect after the window.
Local Git remains available outside the relay.

retained_local_safe_capabilities: continue local editing, save, search, Git, diagnostics, and export while the relay drains
blocked_managed_only_capabilities: join remote control sessions through the draining relay
local_continuity.continuity_summary: The relay drain blocks new managed joins but does not block local-first work.

blocked_write_classes.note: New presence joins wait until the user reconnects after maintenance.
New remote-control joins are blocked during drain.

guidance_actions.message: Continue local work while managed collaboration drains.
Reconnect collaboration after the drain window instead of retrying joins now.
Export shared session notes before the maintenance cutover if they are needed offline.

boundary_change_summary.summary: Relay drain does not change tenant, region, residency, key ownership, or endpoint identity.

display_copy.primary_status_line: Collaboration relay drain is active until May 4, 2026 01:30 America/Los_Angeles.
display_copy.local_continuity_line: Local editing, save, search, Git, diagnostics, and export remain available.
display_copy.blocked_writes_line: New collaboration joins and remote-control joins wait for reconnect later.
